scripts.test: node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/*.test.mjs && python3 -m unittest tests/test_asset_recovery.py tests/test_recovery_analyzer.py tests/test_comfy_png_metadata.py tests/test_comic_png_metadata_v2.py -v && node --check audit-ui.js && node --check scripts/check_evidence_chain.mjs && node --check scripts/check_historical_pr_evidence.mjs && node --check scripts/build_visual_proof.mjs && node scripts/check.mjs && node scripts/check_evidence_chain.mjs && node scripts/check_historical_pr_evidence.mjs
scripts.test:recovery: python3 -m unittest tests/test_asset_recovery.py tests/test_recovery_analyzer.py tests/test_comfy_png_metadata.py tests/test_comic_png_metadata_v2.py -v
scripts.test:evidence: node --test tests/pr-evidence-policy.test.mjs tests/historical-pr-evidence.test.mjs tests/pages-outcome-preserve-proof.test.mjs && node --check audit-ui.js && node --check scripts/check_evidence_chain.mjs && node --check scripts/check_historical_pr_evidence.mjs && node --check scripts/build_visual_proof.mjs && node scripts/check_evidence_chain.mjs && node scripts/check_historical_pr_evidence.mjs
